name: shravan-dev-workflow
description: Codex-first development workflow plugin with evidence-backed review orchestration, TUI presentation guidance, and Linear work organization.

interface.shortDescription: Codex-first workflow with review, TUI presentation, and Linear planning
interface.longDescription: Use Shravan Dev Workflow to run evidence-backed code and plan reviews with Codex subagents as the primary reviewers, agy as external counsel for substantial reviews, and optional Claude or Gemini adversarial lanes only when explicitly requested. It also includes TUI presentation guidance for structured chat output and Linear work organization for projects, milestones, issues, and dependencies.
